hero.subtitle: Targeted campaigns across Meta, Google, TikTok, and Xiaohongshu — built to acquire higher-quality customers with smarter budget allocation.

details.title: What We Do & Why It Matters
details.card1Desc: Burning ad budget on the wrong audiences. Most campaigns lack clear targeting, performance creative, or a coherent funnel strategy — resulting in high CPAs and low ROAS.
details.card2Desc: Full-funnel paid ad management — audience strategy, creative production, bidding optimisation, and cross-platform budget allocation working as one connected system.
details.card3Desc: Lower cost per acquisition, higher ROAS, and campaigns that compound in efficiency over time as data accumulates and targeting sharpens.

subFeatures.title: Every Deliverable,
subFeatures.item1Desc: Facebook and Instagram campaigns covering awareness, retargeting, and conversion — with creative and audience strategy built in.
subFeatures.item2Desc: Search, Shopping, and Performance Max campaigns targeting high-intent queries at the moment customers are ready to act.
subFeatures.item3Desc: Short-form video ad campaigns built for TikTok's unique algorithm — reaching engaged audiences at scale with native-feeling creative.
subFeatures.item4Desc: Paid placements and influencer-adjacent content on Xiaohongshu to reach Chinese-speaking audiences in Australia and beyond.
subFeatures.item5Desc: Precise audience segmentation, lookalike modelling, and retargeting sequences that follow potential customers through the funnel.
subFeatures.item6Desc: Weekly performance reviews with clear ROAS, CPA, and CPL data — plus ongoing creative and bid optimisation to improve results.

caseStudy.title: Real Results for Real Businesses
caseStudy.case1Problem: Spending $8K/month on ads with a blended ROAS of 1.4. No retargeting, generic creative, and campaigns optimised for clicks rather than purchases.
caseStudy.case2Problem: Relying on organic traffic and referrals with no paid acquisition system. Seasonal enrolment peaks were being missed with no campaign infrastructure in place.
